MINI MINUTES:
Claimant/Defendant appeared in pro per. (No card.)

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Beneficial California Inc.'s Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off-calendar. The levy was terminated by the Sheriff on October 3, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
